## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Phase + Scope
- Phase: <!-- e.g., Phase 2 -->
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- [ ] Required deliverables completed and linked.
- [ ] Mandatory checks executed and passing.
- [ ] Exit criteria verified with evidence.

## Naming Convention Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows required prefix format: `Fix/`, `Feat/`, `Chore/`, `Docs/`, `Refactor/`, `Test/`, or `Perf/`.
- [ ] Source branch follows the same required prefix format.

## Handoff Artifacts (required when applicable)
- [ ] Contract delta handoff: `docs/handoffs/contract-delta.md` (or N/A)
- [ ] Schema parity handoff: `docs/handoffs/schema-parity.md` (or N/A)
- [ ] QA impact handoff: `docs/handoffs/qa-impact.md` (or N/A)

## Validation
- [ ] I ran relevant local checks/tests.
- [ ] I updated docs/config where needed.

## Notes
- Any follow-ups, caveats, or deployment notes.
